agent_spec.task: I need to schedule a job that runs every day at midnight (00:00). Before I create it, please verify that the cron expression '0 0 * * *' is valid.

tools.description: Validates a given cron expression. Accepts a single 'cron' string parameter and returns a JSON object with 'valid' (boolean), 'components' (breakdown of each field), and 'description' (human-readable next execution).
Creates a scheduled job. Requires 'name', 'cron', and 'command' parameters. Returns a confirmation with job ID and status.
Lists all currently scheduled jobs. No parameters required. Returns an array of job objects.

params.error_message: Validation service temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
